aiTitle: Upgrade AI platform with deal flow matchmaker changes

input.content:
# Upgrade ai-data-platform to the spindle platform architecture

Vendors the upstream `deal-flow-matchmaker` refactor into `ai-data-platform/` and re-ports all VietNexus-local features onto the new layout.

## What's new (from upstream)

- **`spindle/`** — generic, manifest-driven platform core: `Protocol` ports, plugin registry, DAG engine (declarative fan-out + `on_reject` retry edges), app_id-scoped Postgres adapter, and a domain-agnostic supervisor (`python -m spindle.app.supervisor`; `spine.supervisor` remains as a compat shim).
- **`apps/matchmaker/`** — the deal-flow app as a plugin: `app.yaml` manifest (agents, ports, sagas), stage handlers in `plugin.py`, `MatchmakerStore` facade, own migrations, and the **self-improvement loop** (P1/P2: corroboration ledger + gated version registry, proven offline).
- **North Star harness** — offline A1–A5 cold-boot regression gate (`bash scripts/north_star.sh`): fake agent runtime, ephemeral migrated DB, ~0 cost.
- **`migrations/005_platform_appid.sql`** — multi-app tenancy (renumbered from upstream's 004 to slot after our `004_embeddings.sql`).

## Local features re-ported

- Embedding matcher + pgvector + FPT/hash-fallback embeddings → `apps/matchmaker/{embedding.py, matcher/{embedding_matcher,semantic}.py}`
- Relationship-graph BFS → `apps/matchmaker/graph.py`
- Cleanup saga (janitor audit → prefix-railed purge) declared in `app.yaml`, handlers in `plugin.py`, helpers in `apps/matchmaker/cleanup.py`
- Embed-on-upsert + `delete_entities` ported into `MatchmakerStore`
- Dashboard admin-JWT gate + graph/RAG/by-user match endpoints kept in `api/app.py`

## Fixes along the way

- Restored the **enrichment gate** (`status='unverified'` for dead seeds) that the upstream Phase-5 move dropped (upstream's own `test_enrichment_gate` fails collection).
- Spindle supervisor: generic `stages=` restriction (cleanup drains without leasing stale onboarding/outreach jobs); fixed a shadowed loop variable that silently ignored it.
- `delete_entities` skips the lazily-created `matches_v2` shadow table on fresh DBs instead of aborting the purge transaction.
- Standalone compose Postgres → `pgvector/pgvector:pg16` (needed by `004_embeddings.sql`).

## Verification

- All 7 migrations apply clean on a fresh DB (001→005 + app migrations); the runner's legacy-basename ledger handling means the live DB won't re-run 001–004.
- **103/103 tests pass**, including the North Star gate, self-improvement tests, and our embedding/graph/dashboard-auth tests.
- Offline end-to-end cleanup-saga drill through the real DAG engine: junk purged, real entities spared, saga marked done.
- Final pre-PR review by a subagent: REVIEW_PLACEHOLDER

## Deploy note

After merge, rebuild the platform container: `docker compose up -d --build ai-data-platform` (not part of the rolling-deploy web chain).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

- **`spindle/`** — generic, manifest-driven platform core: `Protocol` ports, plugin registry, DAG engine (declarative fan-out + `on_reject` retry edges), app_id-scoped Postgres adapter, and a domain-agnostic supervisor (`python -m spindle.app.supervisor`; `spine.supervisor` remains as a compat shim).
- **`apps/matchmaker/`** — the deal-flow app as a plugin: `app.yaml` manifest (agents, ports, sagas), stage handlers in `plugin.py`, `MatchmakerStore` facade, own migrations, and the **self-improvement loop** (P1/P2: corroboration ledger + gated version registry, proven offline).
- **North Star harness** — offline A1–A5 cold-boot regression gate (`bash scripts/north_star.sh`): fake agent runtime, ephemeral migrated DB, ~0 cost.
- **`migrations/005_platform_appid.sql`** — multi-app tenancy (renumbered from upstream's 004 to slot after our `004_embeddings.sql`).

## Local features re-ported

- Embedding matcher + pgvector + FPT/hash-fallback embeddings → `apps/matchmaker/{embedding.py, matcher/{embedding_matcher,semantic}.py}`
- Relationship-graph BFS → `apps/matchmaker/graph.py`
- Cleanup saga (janitor audit → prefix-railed purge) declared in `app.yaml`, handlers in `plugin.py`, helpers in `apps/matchmaker/cleanup.py`
- Embed-on-upsert + `delete_entities` ported into `MatchmakerStore`
- Dashboard admin-JWT gate + graph/RAG/by-user match endpoints kept in `api/app.py`

## Fixes along the way

- Restored the **enrichment gate** (`status='unverified'` for dead seeds) that the upstream Phase-5 move dropped (upstream's own `test_enrichment_gate` fails collection).
- Spindle supervisor: generic `stages=` restriction (cleanup drains without leasing stale onboarding/outreach jobs); fixed a shadowed loop variable that silently ignored it.
- `delete_entities` skips the lazily-created `matches_v2` shadow table on fresh DBs instead of aborting the purge transaction.
- Standalone compose Postgres → `pgvector/pgvector:pg16` (needed by `004_embeddings.sql`).

- **103/103 tests pass**, including the North Star gate, self-improvement tests, and our embedding/graph/dashboard-auth tests.
- Offline end-to-end cleanup-saga drill through the real DAG engine: junk purged, real entities spared, saga marked done.
